issues.detail: The instructions do not cover error handling for missing or incomplete data.
The skill requires Python 3.9+ and specific libraries, limiting compatibility with non-Python agents.

scenarios.name: Mutual partnership NDA in DOCX
scenarios.rationale: Treatment follows the full 9-section template with symmetric mutual obligations and disclaimer, while baseline produces ad-hoc structure missing several required sections.

scenarios.name: Employee NDA covering source code and customer data
scenarios.rationale: Treatment hits the prescribed scope, employment+3y duration, four standard exclusions, and DOCX default; baseline covers scope but skips standard exclusions and uses a generic shorter term.
